What is the color of the rolling pin resting on the countertop? A. Dusty pink B. Light blue C. Light brown D. White
What entities are present on the countertop and how are they arranged?
canonical_answer: A light-colored wooden countertop supports a wooden rolling pin resting diagonally near the center. Two packages of raw red ground meat sealed in clear plastic sit in the foreground and to the right of the pin. A white vacuum sealer machine is partially visible on the far left edge of the counter surface.

Describe the visual sequence from the introductory text to the final kitchen setup.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the text 'Hamburger Tip' displays on a pink background; at 2s, the title 'Vacuum Sealing Hamburger Tip' centers on screen; at 6s, the view shifts to a wooden countertop with a rolling pin; at 8s, vacuum sealed meat packages appear in the foreground; at 10s, a white appliance is visible on the left edge.

question: Has the person started using the yellow rolling pin to flatten the meat yet?

canonical_answer: The person uses the rolling pin to flatten the meat inside the plastic bag.
